options.formula:
IF(
  OR(
    {fldXZNI96v8HgjuSh} = "Inactive",
    {fldXZNI96v8HgjuSh} = "Paused",
    IS_AFTER(TODAY(), {fldhTpqQsVAnHpTCz})
  ),
  "Inactive",

  IF(
    NOT({fld0NPreZFBMPKb6C}),
    "Needs Setup",

    IF(
      {fldt99hUToivhxcgp} > 0,
      "In Payment",

      IF(
        {fldOomc6d9Jlx1lWU} < 0,
        "Overdue",
        "Active"
      )
    )
  )
)

DATETIME_FORMAT(
  DATEADD(
    IF(
      VALUE({fld7IsfiGvKpxEwSs}) >= DAY(TODAY()),
      DATETIME_PARSE(DATETIME_FORMAT(TODAY(), "YYYY-MM-01")),
      DATETIME_PARSE(DATETIME_FORMAT(DATEADD(TODAY(), 1, "month"), "YYYY-MM-01"))
    ),
    MIN(
      VALUE({fld7IsfiGvKpxEwSs}),
      DAY(
        DATEADD(
          DATEADD(
            IF(
              VALUE({fld7IsfiGvKpxEwSs}) >= DAY(TODAY()),
              DATETIME_PARSE(DATETIME_FORMAT(TODAY(), "YYYY-MM-01")),
              DATETIME_PARSE(DATETIME_FORMAT(DATEADD(TODAY(), 1, "month"), "YYYY-MM-01"))
            ),
            1,
            "month"
          ),
          -1,
          "day"
        )
      )
    ) - 1,
    "day"
  ),
  "DD/MM/YYYY"
)

ROUND(
  IF(
    ABS(
      IF({flddlKGsVh5zCsZBt}=BLANK(), 0, {flddlKGsVh5zCsZBt})
      - IF({fld9JibXkMpTeMcxw}=BLANK(), 0, {fld9JibXkMpTeMcxw})
    ) <= 0.01,
    0,
    ABS(
      IF({flddlKGsVh5zCsZBt}=BLANK(), 0, {flddlKGsVh5zCsZBt})
      - IF({fld9JibXkMpTeMcxw}=BLANK(), 0, {fld9JibXkMpTeMcxw})
    )
  ),
  2
)

IF(
  {fld9JibXkMpTeMcxw}=BLANK(),
  "No Expected Cost",
  IF(
    ABS({flddlKGsVh5zCsZBt} - {fld9JibXkMpTeMcxw}) <= 0.01,
    "Exact Match",
    IF({flddlKGsVh5zCsZBt} > {fld9JibXkMpTeMcxw}, "Overpaid", "Underpaid")
  )
)

IF(
  {fld7IsfiGvKpxEwSs},
  IF(
    DATEADD(
      DATETIME_PARSE(DATETIME_FORMAT(TODAY(), 'YYYY-MM-01'), 'YYYY-MM-DD'),
      MIN(
        VALUE({fld7IsfiGvKpxEwSs}),
        DAY(
          DATEADD(
            DATEADD(
              DATETIME_PARSE(DATETIME_FORMAT(TODAY(), 'YYYY-MM-01'), 'YYYY-MM-DD'),
              1,
              'month'
            ),
            -1,
            'day'
          )
        )
      ) - 1,
      'days'
    ) >= TODAY(),
    DATEADD(
      DATETIME_PARSE(DATETIME_FORMAT(TODAY(), 'YYYY-MM-01'), 'YYYY-MM-DD'),
      MIN(
        VALUE({fld7IsfiGvKpxEwSs}),
        DAY(
          DATEADD(
            DATEADD(
              DATETIME_PARSE(DATETIME_FORMAT(TODAY(), 'YYYY-MM-01'), 'YYYY-MM-DD'),
              1,
              'month'
            ),
            -1,
            'day'
          )
        )
      ) - 1,
      'days'
    ),
    DATEADD(
      DATEADD(
        DATETIME_PARSE(DATETIME_FORMAT(TODAY(), 'YYYY-MM-01'), 'YYYY-MM-DD'),
        1,
        'month'
      ),
      MIN(
        VALUE({fld7IsfiGvKpxEwSs}),
        DAY(
          DATEADD(
            DATEADD(
              DATETIME_PARSE(DATETIME_FORMAT(TODAY(), 'YYYY-MM-01'), 'YYYY-MM-DD'),
              2,
              'month'
            ),
            -1,
            'day'
          )
        )
      ) - 1,
      'days'
    )
  )
)

IF(
  {fldcfmqSaWYfWBQ56}=1,
  "In Payment",
  IF(
    {fldmAaI8NSpBUjYQi} < TODAY(),
    "Overdue",
    IF({fldmAaI8NSpBUjYQi}=TODAY(), "Due Today", "In Payment")
  )
)

IF(
  {fldt99hUToivhxcgp} > 0,
  "In Payment",
  IF(
    IS_SAME({fldBNVtxmnYTFQS8e}, TODAY(), 'day'),
    "Due Today",
    IF(
      {fldBNVtxmnYTFQS8e} < TODAY(),
      "Overdue",
      "Upcoming"
    )
  )
)

SWITCH(
  {fld6KIXJyc7JWxgiM},
  "Overdue","Overdue",
  "Due Today","Due Today",
  "Due 01–07","In Payment",
  "Due 08–14","In Payment",
  "Due 15–21","In Payment",
  "Due 22–28","In Payment",
  "Future","In Payment"
)

fields.name: Last Reconciled Payment Date
fields.description: Auto-set by the dashboard reconciliation flow to the date of the most recent reconciled transaction linked to this cost. Single source of truth for the Accounts Payable Fixed dashboard.

fields.name: Last Reconciled Amount
fields.description: Auto-set by the dashboard reconciliation flow to the amount of the most recent reconciled transaction linked to this cost. Used for variance checking against Expected Cost.

fields.name: Last Reconciled Account
fields.description: Auto-set by the dashboard reconciliation flow to the account of the most recent reconciled transaction linked to this cost. Reflects whichever account paid most recently — may change month to month.

fields.name: Last Reconciled Sub-Category
fields.description: Auto-set by the dashboard reconciliation flow to the Chart of Accounts sub-category of the most recent reconciled transaction linked to this cost.

fields.name: Cost Status (New)
fields.description: Clean status field owned by the dashboard. Replaces the legacy multi-status singleSelect. Inactive auto-set by Airtable automation when End Payment Date passes; Overdue flagged manually or via reconciliation review.

fields.name: Days Overdue
fields.description: Computed by the dashboard on every load. Positive = days past expected next payment. Negative = days until due. Synced for filtering and reporting.

fields.name: Variance Amount
fields.description: Computed by the dashboard: Last Reconciled Amount − Expected Cost. Positive = paid more than expected. Synced for filtering and reporting.

fields.name: Variance Flag
fields.description: Computed by the dashboard. Match: ≤£1 and ≤2%. Soft: 2–10%. Hard: >10%. Unknown: no reconciled amount yet. Synced for filtering.

fields.name: Expected Next Payment
fields.description: Computed by the dashboard from Last Reconciled Payment Date + Frequency (or upcoming Due Day if never reconciled). Synced for filtering and reporting.

fields.name: Variance Dismissed At Recon
fields.description: Stores the Last Reconciled Payment Date at which the user dismissed the variance flag. Dismissal is sticky until a NEW reconciliation arrives (i.e. when Last Reconciled Payment Date changes, the dismissal becomes stale and the variance badge re-appears). Empty = not dismissed.

fields.name: Status Locked Until Recon
fields.description: Stores the Last Reconciled Payment Date at which the user manually set the Payment Status. Auto-flip (In Payment ↔ Overdue) skips this cost while the lock is current. The lock expires automatically when a new reconciliation arrives (lastReconDate changes), at which point auto-flip resumes.

fields.name: Monthly rent paid out per unit
Date the property is expected to be vacant
💸 Cost Price Monthly Rent Received (per unit)
💸 Cost Price Annual Rent Received (per unit)

💸 Sale Price Monthly Rent Paid Out (per unit)
💸 Sale Price Annual Rent Paid (per unit)

💸 Sale Price Annual Rent Paid Out

Gross Profit Margin Month to Date
Net Profit Margin Week to Date
Net Profit Margin Month to Date
# of Units (Used in Monthly Rent Paid Out Formula)
Valuation History
fields.description: All valuations ever created for this property (back-link from Property Valuations table).

fields.name: Unit Status Last Modified (used in Zap)
Payment Status Last Modified (used in Zap)
Tenancy End Date Duration in Months

options.formula:
IF(
  {fldVY4n7haZeBbJ4K} >= {fldRBsOhhKWnBE7at},
  IF(
    TODAY() > {fldEt3O3759AuzCwb},
    "Paid Late",
    "Paid On Time"
  ),
  IF(
    TODAY() > {fldEt3O3759AuzCwb},
    "Overdue",
    "In Payment"
  )
)

fields.name: 💸 Cost Price Monthly Rent Received (per unit)
💸 Sale Price Monthly Rent Paid Out (per unit)
Time from void to Rent Ready VOID
Time from Rent Ready VOID to Occupied

options.formula:
IF(
  {fldEvGsAFU59jbaxI},
  IF(
    {fld6NioAYw6z3wjag},
    "⚠ CFV Actioned (from flags)",
    "⚠ CFV (from flags)"
  ),
  "✓ In Payment (from flags)"
)

IF(
  {fldhy2U0CQmM2oS4P},
  IF(
    DATEADD(
      DATETIME_PARSE(DATETIME_FORMAT(TODAY(), "YYYY-MM-01"), "YYYY-MM-DD"),
      MIN(
        VALUE({fldhy2U0CQmM2oS4P}),
        DAY(
          DATEADD(
            DATEADD(
              DATETIME_PARSE(DATETIME_FORMAT(TODAY(), "YYYY-MM-01"), "YYYY-MM-DD"),
              1,
              "month"
            ),
            -1,
            "day"
          )
        )
      ) - 1,
      "days"
    ) >= TODAY(),
    DATEADD(
      DATETIME_PARSE(DATETIME_FORMAT(TODAY(), "YYYY-MM-01"), "YYYY-MM-DD"),
      MIN(
        VALUE({fldhy2U0CQmM2oS4P}),
        DAY(
          DATEADD(
            DATEADD(
              DATETIME_PARSE(DATETIME_FORMAT(TODAY(), "YYYY-MM-01"), "YYYY-MM-DD"),
              1,
              "month"
            ),
            -1,
            "day"
          )
        )
      ) - 1,
      "days"
    ),
    DATEADD(
      DATEADD(
        DATETIME_PARSE(DATETIME_FORMAT(TODAY(), "YYYY-MM-01"), "YYYY-MM-DD"),
        1,
        "month"
      ),
      MIN(
        VALUE({fldhy2U0CQmM2oS4P}),
        DAY(
          DATEADD(
            DATEADD(
              DATETIME_PARSE(DATETIME_FORMAT(TODAY(), "YYYY-MM-01"), "YYYY-MM-DD"),
              2,
              "month"
            ),
            -1,
            "day"
          )
        )
      ) - 1,
      "days"
    )
  )
)

fields.name: Last Fully Paid Due Date Roll Up

options.formula:
IF(
  {fldXwCxcyiBDD6qQN} = "",
  "Ended",
  IF(
    DATETIME_FORMAT({flddINpwqr4gxsz7t}, "YYYY-MM")
      = DATETIME_FORMAT(TODAY(), "YYYY-MM"),
    "Branch: PaidThisMonth",
    IF(
      DATETIME_DIFF(TODAY(), {fldaz9KgaXDQqaQcY}, 'days') > 3,
      "Branch: OverdueAligned",
      "Branch: OKBeforeAlignedDue"
    )
  )
)

IF(
  {fldaz9KgaXDQqaQcY} = "",
  "No Due Date Set",
  IF(
    AND(
      YEAR({fldaz9KgaXDQqaQcY}) = YEAR(TODAY()),
      MONTH({fldaz9KgaXDQqaQcY}) = MONTH(TODAY())
    ),
    "In Payment",
    IF({fldaz9KgaXDQqaQcY} < TODAY(), "Overdue", "Upcoming")
  )
)

IF(
  {fldXwCxcyiBDD6qQN} = BLANK(),
  "Tenancy Ended",
  IF(
    {fld50UBrJNjkN6ROu},
    "CFV Actioned",
    IF(
      DATETIME_DIFF(TODAY(), {fldXwCxcyiBDD6qQN}, 'days') > 3,
      "CFV",
      "In Payment"
    )
  )
)

TRIM(
  ARRAYJOIN({fld1i5bDoHL3B6rUf}, ", ")
  & " — "
  & IF({fld2rPXwwV8dXb1zF},
       DATETIME_FORMAT({fld2rPXwwV8dXb1zF}, 'YYYY-MM-DD'),
       "NO-START"
    )
  & IF({fld7cjLLEHKAx49OK}, " — " & ARRAYJOIN({fld7cjLLEHKAx49OK}, ", "), "")
)

AND(
  {fldSPslO6Wh5IUSK3},
  IS_BEFORE({fldSPslO6Wh5IUSK3}, TODAY()),
  OR(
    NOT({fldzM0OwNb00gdLJL}),
    IS_BEFORE({fldzM0OwNb00gdLJL}, {fldSPslO6Wh5IUSK3})
  )
)

IF(
  AND(
    {fldSPslO6Wh5IUSK3},
    IS_BEFORE({fldSPslO6Wh5IUSK3}, TODAY()),
    OR(
      NOT({fldzM0OwNb00gdLJL}),
      IS_BEFORE({fldzM0OwNb00gdLJL}, {fldSPslO6Wh5IUSK3})
    )
  ),
  "Cashflow Void",
  "In Payment"
)

IF(
AND(
OR(
{fldxU3dPUnbK0SCDq}="CFV",
{fldxU3dPUnbK0SCDq}="CFV Actioned"
),
IS_AFTER({fldijzjPrOTxqvygT}, DATEADD(TODAY(), -30, 'days'))
),
{fldeGMN4ryAI5VwEQ},
0
)

fields.name: Tenancy Agreement
fields.description: Adobe Sign permalink to the signed Assured Shorthold Tenancy (AST) email. Populated during tenant onboarding.

fields.name: Document Links
fields.description: Auto-populated by Inbound Comms OS when emails are filed under '11: tenancy docs'. Each entry is a new line containing date, short label, and Gmail URL. Append-only — never overwritten. Manual additions welcome.

tables.name: Property Valuations
tables.description: Historical valuations per property — AI-estimated, manually reviewed and approved. Each row is a point-in-time snapshot. The Properties' Current Market Value is updated when a valuation is Approved.

fields.name: Title
fields.description: Auto-populated by the Operations OS as 'Property Name — DD MMM YYYY' when a valuation is created.

fields.name: Property
fields.description: Link to the property being valued.

fields.name: Date
fields.description: Date of valuation.

fields.name: Estimated Value
fields.description: The estimated current market value at the time of valuation.

fields.name: Source
fields.description: Where the valuation came from.

fields.name: Status
fields.description: Approved valuations update the property Current Market Value. Pending awaits review. Rejected is kept for audit. Superseded marks an older approved valuation when a newer one supersedes it.

fields.name: Confidence
fields.description: Reliability of the estimate.

fields.name: Comparables
fields.description: JSON list of comparable sales used (address, sale price, date, distance, URL). Populated by the AI estimate flow.

fields.name: Methodology
fields.description: How the value was derived — comps used, adjustments, caveats.

fields.name: Previous Value
fields.description: Market value before this valuation. Lets us compute change-since-last.

fields.name: Approved By
fields.description: Name of the user who approved the valuation.
